_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Vocational vehicles shall be exempted until 2029 from the calculation of average specific CO₂ emissions of manufacturers. For the period 2030 to 2034, only zero-emission vocational vehicles shall be accounted for that calculation. From 2035, all vocational vehicles shall be accounted for that calculation.
prior.source_span: Vocational vehicles should therefore be exempted until 2029 from the calculation of average specific CO 2 emissions of manufacturers. For the period 2030 to 2034, only zero-emission vocational vehicles should be accounted for that calculation. From 2035, all vocational vehicles should be accounted for that calculation.
